description_long: This object is a large, modern residential complex featuring a series of identical single-story houses arranged in a row, each with its own small pool or water feature in front. The houses are separated from a central communal area by a fence or wall, and the communal area includes a large rectangular swimming pool, landscaped lawns, and a main building with a terrace and outdoor seating. The main building appears to serve as a clubhouse or shared facility, with a flat roof and modern architectural lines. The grounds are landscaped with grass, trees, and pathways, and there is a secondary building that could function as a service or utility area. The entire property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, and the layout suggests a gated community or resort-style housing development.
description: A modern residential complex with rows of single-story houses, each with a private pool, surrounding a central communal area with a large pool and clubhouse. The property is landscaped and enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the row of houses with private pools in the foreground and the central communal pool and clubhouse in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of houses, the central pool, and the landscaped communal area with the clubhouse to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the houses, the central pool, and the clubhouse, with the service building and open lawn visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the row of houses on the right, the central pool, and the clubhouse and service building on the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small steps or porches, and minimalistic overhangs; the clubhouse has a prominent terrace and wide entry steps.
